'''''Universe''''' (alternatively, '''Universe Huge''') is the fourth expansion of [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s [[Star Wars Miniatures]] game.

Notably, ''Universe'' was the first set of Miniatures to have characters from more than one era, and the first to expand into the time frame of the [[New Jedi Order]] and [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].
Also, the first "Huge" (3″×3″) miniatures were introduced, many of which were piloted vehicles, or beasts from the movies.

Universe Huge was released on [[August 19]], [[2005]], available in booster packs containing 6 random "Normal-Sized" minis, and one random "Huge" one, allowing for one pack to have two rares.

==Release and reception==
'''''Ultimate Missions: Universe''''', a supplemental book containing scenarios and maps revolving around pieces from the Universe set, was scheduled to be released September 28, 2005, according to amazon.com. However, with the financial failures of the previous three ''Ultimate Missions'' books, the book was canceled. Following Universe, the [[AT-AT Imperial Walker Colossal Pack|AT-AT]] Colossal pack was released, providing new scenarios and an [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] figure.
